overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City. The scene features a mix of natural morning sunlight and artificial neon lighting, with elevated highways, digital billboards, and futuristic architecture. The vehicle navigates through intersections and underpasses in a dense urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: following a red sedan through moderate traffic on a city street

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway running parallel overhead
red car being followed directly ahead
large holographic advertisement displaying a face

segments.scene_description: Driving along a multi-lane city street beneath an elevated highway structure. A red sedan is followed ahead while neon holographic billboards and commercial buildings line the street. The morning sun illuminates the futuristic skyline in the distance.

events.description: vehicle begins left turn at intersection
pedestrians crossing the street in front of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: executing a left turn at the intersection while navigating through crossing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street on the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow striped crosswalk markings at the intersection
tall commercial buildings visible on the left side after the turn

segments.scene_description: Executing a left turn at a large intersection, crossing yellow-striped crosswalk lines. Numerous pedestrians are crossing the street, and the elevated highway structure shifts to the right side of the frame as the vehicle changes direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway under elevated rail with digital billboards

events.description: passing under large overhead digital billboard structure

agents.ego_description: driving straight under the elevated highway past large digital advertisements

entered.detail: massive digital screens displaying advertisements including 'WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH'
yellow and red safety barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: Driving straight under the elevated highway past massive overhead digital billboards displaying advertisements. The road is lined with yellow safety barriers and commercial buildings, with moderate traffic flowing in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with neon advertisements

events.description: entering covered underpass, lighting shifts to artificial neon
exiting underpass back into natural daylight

agents.ego_description: driving through the covered underpass with moderate traffic toward the exit

entered.detail: concrete tunnel structure covering the road with steel beams
glowing neon advertisements on the left tunnel wall
glowing neon advertisements on the right tunnel wall
red road sign indicating 'M Ebunike' visible at tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered underpass where natural light gives way to artificial neon illumination from wall-mounted advertisements. The vehicle continues through the concrete tunnel toward the exit, where an 'M Ebunike' sign becomes visible before emerging back into daylight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic urban corridor that transitions from sunlit city streets into a neon-lit underpass. It begins by following a red sedan along a multi-lane road beneath an elevated highway, where holographic billboards line the street under a bright morning skyline. As the vehicle executes a left turn across a crowded pedestrian intersection, the highway structure shifts position in the frame before the camera straightens out to pass under massive overhead digital advertisements and yellow safety barriers. The scene then shifts from natural daylight into the artificial glow of a covered underpass, gliding past wall-mounted neon signs. Finally, the vehicle passes an M Ebunike sign as it emerges from the concrete tunnel back into the open light of the city.
